formulas.name: Founding of Vijayanagara Empire
formulas.statement: The Vijayanagara Empire was founded by Harihara and Bukka in 1336 CE.
formulas.description: Founding of the empire by two brothers Harihara and Bukka, who were feudatories of the Kakatiyas.
formulas.notes: This is a historical fact and not a formula.

formulas.name: Vijayanagara Empire's Capital
formulas.statement: The capital of the Vijayanagara Empire was Vijayanagara.
formulas.description: The capital city of the Vijayanagara Empire was Vijayanagara, which was strategically located to control the trade routes.
formulas.notes: This is a historical fact and not a formula.

formulas.name: Vijayanagara Empire's Rulers
formulas.statement: The notable rulers of the Vijayanagara Empire include Harihara, Bukka, Deva Raya I, and Krishnadeva Raya.
formulas.description: The notable rulers of the Vijayanagara Empire played significant roles in expanding and strengthening the empire.
formulas.notes: This is a historical fact and not a formula.

formulas.name: Vijayanagara Empire's Economy
formulas.statement: The Vijayanagara Empire's economy was based on agriculture, trade, and commerce.
formulas.description: The economy of the Vijayanagara Empire was diversified, with agriculture, trade, and commerce being the main contributors.
formulas.notes: This is a historical fact and not a formula.
